title: Dynamic Pack Languages
description: The resource pack of the mod Dynamic Pack Manager used to translates commands
body:
# What is it ?

This is the resource pack used by the mod [Dynamic Pack Manager](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-pack-manager) to provide translations on commands dynamically.

See the mod [Dynamic Pack Manager](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-pack-manager) to have more details
